Material shortlist · OPC
Four options we would compare.
Use this when OPC recommends products, materials, finishes, or service options for a topic.
Tile
Tile photo
01
Porcelain tile
Best for wet zones, heavy traffic, easy cleaning, and consistent sizing.
Stone
Stone photo
02
Quartz or stone
Best for counters, island impact, durability, and resale-friendly finishes.
Wood
Wood photo
03
Wood tone
Use for warmth, shelves, vanities, floors, beams, or cabinet contrast.
Metal
Hardware photo
04
Hardware finish
Small choice, big effect: pulls, faucet, lighting, hinges, and trim color.
